summary: Comprehensive testing of ULN Phase B: Full CRUD for assets, rights, and distribution endpoints. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Catalog tab with Add/Edit/Delete asset functionality, Rights panel with splits/territories/AI consent, Distribution tab with endpoint CRUD and summary cards/health bar, Audit Snapshot tab with v2.0 schema including rights data.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend CRUD endpoints properly implement authentication via get_current_user dependency
Asset creation generates unique asset_id with ASSET- prefix
Rights upsert correctly handles both create and update scenarios
Delete asset cascade removes associated rights data
Endpoint CRUD properly validates label existence before operations
Audit snapshot v2.0 includes rights array with rights_count
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Add Asset modal validates required title field before submission
Rights panel shows percentage allocation and territory chips
Distribution summary cards correctly calculate health percentage
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: ULN Phase B CRUD fully tested. Backend: All CRUD endpoints working for assets (POST/PUT/DELETE), rights (GET/PUT), and endpoints (POST/PUT/DELETE). Audit snapshot returns v2.0 schema with rights data. Frontend: Catalog tab shows real assets with Add Asset button and modal form. Rights panel opens via shield icon with splits, territories, AI consent toggle. Distribution tab shows summary cards (total/live/pending/errors), health bar, and endpoints table with Add Endpoint modal. Audit Snapshot tab shows v2.0 download button. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!

backend_endpoints.POST /api/uln/labels/{id}/catalog/assets: PASS - Creates asset with generated asset_id
backend_endpoints.DELETE /api/uln/labels/{id}/catalog/asse: PASS - Removes asset and cascades to rights
backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/labels/{id}/catalog/assets/: PASS - Returns rights or null if not configured
backend_endpoints.POST /api/uln/labels/{id}/endpoints: PASS - Creates endpoint with generated endpoint_id
backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/labels/{id}/distribution/st: PASS - Returns endpoints with summary and health_pct
backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/labels/{id}/audit-snapshot: PASS - Returns v2.0 schema with rights array

frontend_components.Catalog tab: PASS - Shows assets table with Title/Type/Artist/ISRC/Release/Status/Streams/Actions columns
frontend_components.Add Asset button: PASS - Opens modal form with all fields
frontend_components.Add Asset modal: PASS - Form with Title, Type, Status, Artist, ISRC, UPC, Genre, Release Date fields
frontend_components.Edit/Delete asset buttons: PASS - Action buttons visible on each row
frontend_components.Rights panel (shield icon): PASS - Opens panel with asset name, splits, territories, AI consent, exclusive rights
frontend_components.Add Split button: PASS - Adds new split row with party/role/percentage fields
frontend_components.Territory chips: PASS - Shows GLOBAL, US, UK, EU, CA, AU, JP, BR, KR, IN, MX options
frontend_components.Distribution tab: PASS - Shows summary cards (Total/Live/Pending/Errors) and health bar
frontend_components.Distribution health bar: PASS - Shows percentage with color-coded bar
frontend_components.Add Endpoint modal: PASS - Form with Platform dropdown, Status, Type, Credentials Ref
frontend_components.Edit/Delete endpoint buttons: PASS - Action buttons visible on each row
frontend_components.Audit Snapshot tab: PASS - Shows Full Label Snapshot (v2.0) with Download button
frontend_components.Audit Snapshot includes: PASS - Lists label metadata, members, catalog, rights splits/territories/AI consent, distribution, audit trail

data_validation.Rights upsert persistence: PASS - Create and update verified via GET
data_validation.Delete cascade: PASS - Deleting asset removes associated rights
data_validation.Audit snapshot v2.0 schema: PASS - Contains rights array and rights_count

mocked_data_note: No mocked APIs - all CRUD operations are real against MongoDB
